summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Antigravity startup incubator platform. Backend APIs working well (13/14 tests passed), frontend UI polished and functional. Main issue: provided test credentials don't exist in database.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Login fails with provided test credentials (test2@example.com/password123)
flaky_endpoints.workaround: User registration works perfectly, can create new test users

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero, navigation, domain cards
User registration with engineering/design/business domain selection
Backend health check and root endpoints
Skills taxonomy API returns grouped skills
AI idea validation with proper response structure
Skill gap analysis and readiness scoring
Project creation UI with comprehensive form

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (core functionality working, minor UI improvements needed)

action_item_for_main_agent: Create test user account (test2@example.com/password123) in database for testing purposes. Consider making logout button more prominent in dashboard sidebar.
